allow: PowerShell($mvn = Get-Command mvn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($mvn\) { "mvn: $\($mvn.Source\)" } else { "no mvn on PATH" }; $lombok = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.m2\\repository\\org\\projectlombok\\lombok"; if \(Test-Path $lombok\) { "lombok cached:"; Get-ChildItem $lombok | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name } else { "lombok NOT in local .m2" })
